case_title: EEOC / iTutorGroup automated hiring discrimination matter
current_best_local_public_record: EEOC filing and settlement press releases naming Civil Action No. 1:22-cv-02565
blocker_evidence: Official EDNY query path redirected to PACER login; PACER locator signals account/fee surface; anonymous CourtListener mirror/API probes were blocked and cannot be treated as nonexistence evidence.
preferred_upgrade_route: Capture one open complaint consent decree docket entry or judicial order from an official public court-facing source or clearly labeled open mirror if reachable without login.
compute_or_access_need: Access-bound follow-up rather than local compute
expected_output_if_successful: Exact caption case number filing/decree date and court-facing procedural posture for LIMEN-000002
paper_thesis_use: Supports a reviewer-safe table separating agency-summary-only escalation rows from court-anchored rows and explains why U.S. court completeness is partly access-constrained.
next_smallest_publishability_move: Keep the civil-action number stable and continue bounded public-entrypoint checks without credentialed access.
uncertainty_note: Current package supports only the narrow claim that the EEOC publicly said it filed and later settled the matter; it does not support complaint-level allegations as court-verified text.

current_best_local_public_record: DOJ press release plus locally captured DOJ-linked indictment PDF
blocker_evidence: The captured indictment PDF is image-based for quick extraction: pdftotext and mutool returned only form-feed output while pdfimages shows page images, so exact caption/case-number fields are still unverified from the document body.
preferred_upgrade_route: Run OCR or image-to-text extraction on the already captured DOJ PDF before expanding to new harvesting.
compute_or_access_need: Local compute request preferred over new crawling
expected_output_if_successful: Exact caption case number charge counts and filing metadata extracted from the underlying indictment document
paper_thesis_use: Supports a methods/limitations note showing that some court-family upgrades are compute-bound normalization problems rather than source-discovery failures.
next_smallest_publishability_move: OCR the first-page caption and docket block from the locally captured PDF and then propagate exact fields into shared ledgers if extraction quality is adequate.
uncertainty_note: Until OCR succeeds the package should keep using the DOJ summary page for wording and treat the PDF mainly as document-presence evidence.
